action.reasoning: Observation: frozen CLIP linear probe on 512 samples is still near-random, so the issue is not just optimizer instability during full fine-tuning. Analysis: the most likely bug is wrong feature extraction from CLIP vision outputs; CLIP image embeddings should come from get_image_features / post_layernorm path, not vision_model.pooler_output + visual_projection as currently implemented. If features are wrong, neither probe nor finetuning will learn. Decision: fix model to use CLIPModel.get_image_features-equivalent forward, add a quick feature separability diagnostic and tiny overfit run on 512 samples for several epochs. If train accuracy jumps, we have recovered a valid pipeline and can scale next iteration.
action.command: python train.py --freeze_backbone --epochs 8 --train_subset 512 --val_subset 2048 --batch_size 256 --lr 0.05 --save_path checkpoints/sanity_clip_probe_v2.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/sanity_clip_probe_v2.pt --eval_split val --batch_size 256
